name: Affinity
description: Monitor Affinity relationship intelligence CRM for team access and deal data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Affinity at https://affinity.co
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Copy your API Key
4. Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with colon): echo -n 'apikey:' | base64
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with trailing colon). Found in Affinity Settings → API. Command: echo -n 'apikey:' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Affinity CRM users with access to relationship and deal data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Affinity CRM platform is operational
